summary: Completed comprehensive testing of NeuralTrix AI website with 30+ subpages. All navigation, contact forms, FAQ accordions, and core functionality working perfectly.
passed_tests: All navigation links work to listing pages (/services, /solutions, /case-studies, /industries, /about, /blog, /careers)
Service detail pages load correctly (artificial-intelligence, generative-ai)
Case study detail page loads correctly (ai-video-creation)
About page loads with mission/vision, timeline, team, offices
Careers page loads with job listings and department filters
Contact forms submit successfully on all subpages with success messages
FAQ accordions open/close correctly on all detail pages
Back navigation links work (Back to All Services, etc.)
Footer links navigate to correct subpages
Active nav state highlights current section
ScrollToTop works when navigating between pages
Department filters work on careers page
Backend contact API working (6/6 tests passed)
